feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP ECC AR, tcode F.31, how to include payment document type DZ in exposure calculation
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In SAP ECC AR, tcode F.31, can you please tell how to include payment document type DZ (customer payment or any other document type) in exposure calculation (It's a specific business requirement). I did not find any configuration step allowing this.

It may seems strange to include customer payment in exposure but it's a reel business requirement related to factoring ( you'are paied by bank and then bank will be paied by the reel customer)

Regards

entry.title: Block sales order lines
entry.content:
Dear all,

We have a request from our customer. He would like the line(s) of the sales order to be blocked when the quantity is not full.
At the moment it doesn't block, so we need to go back to the orders to check and correct them if necessary.

Thanks for your help,

entry.title: How to generate an XAF audit file Netherlands
entry.content:
Hello,

we got the request from our dutch accountant to generate an XAF File for Auditors. Although XAF seems to be obligatory since 2010 we were not aksed until now to provide such information. When I check  the Support Portal I found a lot of notes how to establish this function by using the SAP Document and Reporting Compliance but these are all valid only for S/4 HANA.

So although we have licensed SAP DRC due to other request we do not have S/4 HANA at the moment, we are still running on ECC 6.18.

There are also some very rough descriptions how to enable ECC by using DART and AIF to generate this file but these explanation are not detailed enough and AIF Setup is not really smart.

I would be pleased if somebody with an SAP ERP 6.18 share his/her customer expierence with me how to deal with this challenge.

Regards

Holger

SAP ERP SAP Document and Reporting Compliance FIN (Finance) SAP Application Interface Framework

entry.title: GPD : Production order Planned Scrap note pegged
entry.content:
Have a planned order with qty 4 where there is 2 Planned Scrap. Pegging has then shown total Qty 4 with Excess of 2 and assigned Qty 2. 

Converted to Production order and Pegging now shows total Qty 2 and Assign Qty 2. no Excess reported.. 

MRP is showing requirement of 2 and Scrap 2.

entry.title: Required Clarification regarding SAP Rise FUE Access based on Activity
entry.content:
In SAP Rise, users are classified into three primary categories: Advanced, Core, and Self-Service. I require clarification regarding the classification of the following activities to determine under which user category they fall:

  • Sales Invoice Creation (VF01)
  • Purchase Order Creation (ME21N)
  • Payable Creation (MIRO)
  • Payable Parking (MIR7)
  • Customer Invoice Clearing (F-28)
  • Vendor Invoice Clearing (F-53)
  • Cash Journal Posting (FBCJ)
  • G/L Accounting Posting (F-02)
  • Customer Down Payments (F-29)
  • Account Receivable (FB70)
  • Account Payable (FB60)
  • G/L account document (FB50)
  • Asset Creation (AS01)
  • Asset Acquisition (F-9c0)

I know the display access is part of self service mostly, I just need to know the creation and posting activity categories. 

Your guidance in identifying the appropriate user categories for each activity would be appreciated.

entry.title: Tax Determination in Third Party Sales
entry.content:
Dear experts,

How tax is determined in Third Party Sales if Slold to Party , Vendor  and Ship to Party belongs to different Countries?

entry.title: fbl1n transaction access the archive server for retrieving the data
entry.content:
Hi team,

We want to know how frequently this fbl1n transaction access the archive server for retrieving the data

Regards

Arun George

entry.title: Block for accounting of additions of an AF with zero useful life and zero residual value
entry.content:
Dear support
I need to know if there is any parameterization at the customizing level to block postings for additions to Fixed Assets with zero useful life and zero residual value.
I was checking and couldn't find any standard options.
Could you tell me if this is possible using the BADI FIAA_002? Or is there another way to develop ABAP logic to solve this requirement of my company?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How do I generate a report of the notes that are added to items and projects in SAP PPM
entry.content:
Hola a todos,

Me gustaria que me ayuden diciéndome si existe alguna tabla o reporte para SAP PPM, en el cual pueda generar las notas agregadas al proyecto en la pestaña de documentos y notas.

Muchas gracias.

entry.title: How do I generate a report of the notes that are added to items and projects in SAP PPM
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I would like you to help me by telling me if there is a table or report for SAP PPM, in which I can generate the notes added to the project in the documents and notes tab.

Thank you very much

entry.title: Movement using the MIGO T-code, it works correctly. BUT SAME BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE ERROR
entry.content: When I perform a 101 movement using the MIGO T-code, it works correctly. However, when I attempt the same movement using BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE, I receive the following errors: 'Shortfall of 41 days against SLED in current item (20.08.2024)' and 'Shortfall of 115 days against remaining shelf life in current item (365 days). I used the same material and batch for the Purchase Order in both MIGO and the BAPI. Could anyone please provide a solution or guidance on where to check for this issue in the BAPI?

entry.title: Ability to save files in a server folder from SAP DMS but be restricted to access thru OS
entry.content: User should be able to check out documents in DMS,  access those documents in file server folders, make changes and be able to save back to the folder from SAP.  But the users should not be able to access those documents directly using Windows explorer.

entry.title: India Regulatory rules compliance audit trail from DB setup
entry.content:
Dear Support,

We need clear informations and detailled technical guidance  regarding the implementation of the India regulatory rules related to the maintenance of an audit trail, as outlined in SAP note 3042258,

entry.title: SAP error
entry.content:
Error Message:

Outbound Delivery not created!
An item with no delivery quantity is not permitted. Item will be deleted.
No instance of object type OutboundDelivery has been created. External re


The sale only generated the Purchasing Doc. but fails to generate the delivery.
Any advice on how to proceed?

- stock checked through MMBE that is also available in unrestricted us

Thank you.

entry.title: Restrict duplicate invoices only for a certain company code
entry.content:
Dear Team,

 

We have a requirement to restrict the posting of Vendor duplicate invoices at MIRO level for specific company code.

Currently we have 5 company codes but we want to restrict duplicate invoices(Error message) only for one specific company code. 

I have maintained the below configurational settings

1.OMRDC- Selct Check boxes for Company code, Reference number and Invoice date

2.OMRM/OBA5- Maintained message class “108 & 462” to convert the warning message to Error message

3.XK02- Select duplicate invoice check box in Vendor master data level

Even after maintaining all the above configurations, system is able to restrict the duplicate invoice for the requested company code but this also affects all other remaining company codes.

The combination for restricting the duplicate invoice—Same Company code, Same vendor code, same invoice date and same reference number. Should exclude this restriction for reversal invoice document.

Please suggest us the alternative solution to restrict the posting of duplicate invoice at MIRO level only for Specific company code(DIGITS) without being affecting for all other remaining company codes.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Third Process SAP S4/HANA
entry.content:
Dear All,

Can anyone explain me Third party process and configuration in SAP S4/HANA.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Order to cash process and configuration in SAP S4/HANA
entry.content:
Dear All,

Can anyone help me with the Order to cash process and configuration in SAP S4/HANA.

Thanking in Advance!

entry.title: For STO POin S4, in Me21n,Not possible to determine shipping data for material XXXX- Error Message
entry.content:
Customer 2101 does not exist (please change entry in plant XXX)-Warning Message

Not possible to determine shipping data for material XXXX- Error Message

Kindly help all configurations done

entry.title: STRUST-ANAF_ETRANSPORT
entry.content:
Heloo guys,

Trying to make the connection between our sap system and the state institution ANAF (Etransport project), we followed their procedure: 

     In our sap system (SAP NETWEAVER 7.5 sp 28 / EHP8 FOR SAP ERP 6.0 sp21 with sap kernel 754 sp 200/ SSFLIB Version 1.850.40 / sapcryptolob version 8.5.50) from STRUST we activate “SSL server Standard” and from there we generate a certificate request in accordance with the procedure provided by ANAF.

     The resulting file was sent to ANAF and in response we received only the newly issued certificate, without any root or intermediate  CA's certificate.  When we try to import the received response into sap (STRUST-> select SSL Server Standard -> import certificate response) we get the following error "Issuer certificate missing in database:CN=MF Issue CA2, DC=AD, DC=FISC".

     According to sap note 508307 and many other docs, for this error, the certificate that should be imported, should be a concatenation between the response received from ANAF, the intermediate CA if needed and root CA .  But in our case we did not receive intermediate CA and root CA from ANAF. We tried to contact ANAF support to receive these certificates, but we did not receive any response.

     So in this case....the questions  are: Do you have any idea how and from where we can get the missing certificates? Any other way by which we can install the certificate received as a response without having a root CA?

Thank you

entry.title: Highlights of Cloud ERP two-tier Confluence Event – Blog collection
entry.content:
@prakash_karkihallimath @Chandrashekhar_Tipre @eramma_palki @aruna_ayalasomayajula 

We are excited to share highlights of Cloud ERP Two-tier Confluence Event through this blog series.

 

Reflecting on the event, we delved into an overview, master data integration, various sales office scenarios and recent innovations. This blog series aims to help users better understand Two-tier ERP with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

Two-tier ERP addresses groups of companies including headquarters and subsidiaries. It comprises a headquarters ERP with high landscape complexity and being highly customized, and a subsidiaries ERP to support quick scale at lower costs with low landscape complexity. Both headquarters and subsidiaries ERP are integrated in a hybrid landscape with suitable implementation and process optimizations

Check below blog links to know updates from each of the areas

  • Two-tier ERP Overview
  • Two-tier ERP Master Data Replication Options
  • Two-tier ERP Transactional Data Replication options 
  • Sales Office scenarios in Two-tier ERP 
  • Two-tier ERP with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408

To know more click on " What is two-tier ERP? " page on sap.com

You can also reach out two-tier ERP community for more clarifications

Stay tuned for in-depth posts on each topic
